rationale: No direct textual conflict. §48.158 establishes fixed per-teacher allotment amounts and salary maintenance requirements without reference to homestead exemption values or property tax revenue. The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) does not alter any operative provision of this statute.
quote: A school district is entitled to an annual allotment for each classroom teacher who is employed by or contracts with the district for which the allotment is provided as follows:
_note: While increasing the homestead exemption may indirectly reduce local property tax revenue available to school districts, §48.158 contains no provision tying allotment amounts to homestead exemption levels or property tax base. Any fiscal interaction would be addressed through the broader school finance funding formulas, not through amendments to this statute.
